Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Helethshan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan is an Archlord dragon and blood of the Midnight Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan is an Archlord dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan is a black dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan is a member of the dragon family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan is an Archlord dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan uses a Burning Cloak to power his movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Helethshan uses Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Helethshan is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Helethshan was an Archlord.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
